name: ACORN ENERGY, INC.
business: OmniMetrix provides wireless remote monitoring and control systems and IoT applications for power generation equipment and cathodic protection systems for gas pipelines. The company serves both commercial/industrial and residential backup power markets, as well as gas utilities and pipeline operators.

exposures.sentence: OmniMetrix solutions monitor critical equipment used by cell towers, manufacturing plants, medical facilities, data centers, retail stores, public transportation systems, energy distribution and federal, state and municipal government facilities, in addition to residential back-up generators.

OmniMetrix solutions monitor critical equipment used by cell towers, manufacturing plants, medical facilities, data centers, retail stores, public transportation systems, energy distribution and federal, state and municipal government facilities, in addition to residential back-up generators.

OmniMetrix continues to see a rapidly growing need for backup power infrastructure to secure critical military, government, and private sector assets against emergency events including natural disasters, other impacts of climate change, demand response, cybersecurity threats and terrorist attacks.

OmniMetrix solutions monitor critical equipment used by cell towers, manufacturing plants, medical facilities, data centers, retail stores, public transportation systems, energy distribution and federal, state and municipal government facilities, in addition to residential back-up generators.
OmniMetrix s CP services provide remote monitoring and control products for cathodic protection systems on gas pipelines serving the gas utilities market and pipeline operators.
We are dependent on information technology and our systems and infrastructure face certain risks, including cybersecurity breaches and data leakage.

catalysts.event: Launch of Omni family of products (OmniPro commercial monitor and Omni residential monitor) built on OCOM platform
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we launched the Omni family of products the OmniPro commercial monitor and the Omni residential monitor built on a new proprietary common communications core called the OCOM, a platform designed to enhance connectivity, reliability and performance in remote monitoring systems.

catalysts.event: Launch of RADex, an OCOM-based expansion of RAD adding cathodic protection measurements
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we launched the RADex, an OCOM-based expansion of our RAD (Remote AC Mitigation Disconnect) that adds cathodic protection measurements while retaining the ability to remotely disconnect/connect AC mitigation tools on solid-state decouplers, reducing expense and increasing employee safety.

catalysts.event: Strategic technology partnership with AIO Systems, Ltd. for exclusive rights in North America
catalysts.sentence: On January 1, 2026, Acorn Energy entered into a strategic technology partnership with AIO Systems, Ltd. to expand Acorn s infrastructure asset management technology offerings for cell towers, data centers, and utility assets in North America.
